description: Recover delayed site activation against country-level startup baseline.
sopSteps: Check startup bottleneck by country and ethics package status.
Trigger accelerated document cycle with local startup vendor.
Escalate top 5 blocked sites to weekly governance board.
Re-forecast activation curve and update CTMS milestones.

description: Stabilize enrollment trajectory and reduce milestone slippage risk.
sopSteps: Segment low-performing sites by screen-failure and consent rate.
Launch targeted patient-finding channel playbook per country.
Reallocate recruitment support FTE to top opportunity sites.
Publish 2-week recovery trajectory and confidence range.

description: Contain burn-rate drift while protecting critical milestones.
sopSteps: Run variance analysis by vendor, region, and activity bucket.
Freeze non-critical discretionary spend for current cycle.
Shift spend to milestone-critical tasks and renegotiate rates.
Submit updated EAC with mitigation assumptions.

description: Balance functional load and prevent operational bottlenecks.
sopSteps: Map role-level workload against current sprint deliverables.
Reassign support roles from low-risk to high-risk workstreams.
Activate backup vendor pool for temporary overflow.
Track utilization delta and quality signals weekly.
